'''Krül''' was the fiancé of [[Jai Raventhorn]].

During Jai's interrogation on [[Zelos II]] two months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], she related to [[Dirk Harkness]] that she had been engaged to him, but implied in her tone that Krül had perished before the couple could get married.
